Name: 5Cr15MoV Rosewood Boning Knife 150 mm LKWBF10001
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • This 150 mm boning knife may look rather small, but it’s a strong cutting tool for meat and fish. Its best uses are separating sinew, filleting fish, and cutting meat against the grain.
    • \n
  • 5Cr15MoV steel creates the knife blade. It’s a robust steel that allows chefs to use this knife both indoor and outdoor.
    • \n
  • The rosewood handle is more than an eye-catcher. The outstanding ability to endure cracks and deformation makes it practical and pretty at the same time.
    • \n
\n

Good for

\nFish, Meat
